items.text: 现在，Baked Lighting 既有静态灯光，也有固定灯光。 Now, Baked Lighting is with both static and stationary lights. 这是虚幻预先计算光照的一种方法。 And this is a way for Unreal to pre-compute the lighting. 因此，这是一种主要用于电子游戏的技术 So this is a technique that's mostly used in video games 以及 LED 体积的镜头内视觉效果 and also in in-camera visual effects on LED volumes 因为它的性能要好得多。 because it's a lot better for performance. 这意味着我们可以更快地渲染场景 It means we can render our scene a lot faster 因为我们不是每一帧都在计算光照。 because we're not calculating the lighting every single frame. 我们正在预先计算照明。 We're pre-computing that lighting. 实际上，我们要把所有的照明 We're actually taking all the lighting 并将其烘焙为纹理贴图。 and baking it to a texture map instead. 现在我们只需读取这些纹理图 So now we're just reading these texture maps 而不是在场景中生成照明。 instead of generating our lighting in the scene. 但这意味着我们不能有任何动态阴影 But this means that we can't have any dynamic shadows 因为我们的灯光现在已经烘焙到这些纹理贴图中了。 because our lights are now baked into these texture maps. 因此，我们在使用它们时会受到更多限制。 So we're a lot more limited on what we can do with them. 这就是为什么我们在本课程中只关注动态照明。 And that's why we're just going to focus on dynamic lighting in this course. 这是使用虚幻技术制作 VFX 时的最佳选择。 That's the best
